creator: nivo@is-root.com
text:
Hey Marcelo,

Marcelo Araujo wrote on 7-8-2007 5:11:
> Nils Vogels wrote:
>   
>> Hey Marcelo,
>>
>> Marcelo Araujo wrote on 6-8-2007 22:19:
>>   
>>     
>>> Hi Nivo,
>>>
>>> http://people.freebsd.org/~araujo/logs/dovecot-sieve.diff
>>>
>>> You can see this patch?
>>> I need your approval before to commit.
>>>     
>>>       
>> Can you tell me why you are removing libdata/ldconfig/dovecot-sieve from
>> the pkg-plist?
>>   
>>     
> Hi Nils,
>
> Estou testando novamente o seu porto, aplico o seu remendo e tenho este
> erro.
>   
You are lucky that I was tought Latin at school, so I can read a little
bit Italian ;-)
> ====================<phase 7: make package>====================
> ===>  Building package for dovecot-sieve-1.0.2
> Creating package /tmp/packages/All/dovecot-sieve-1.0.2.tbz
> Registering depends:.
> Creating bzip'd tar ball in '/tmp/packages/All/dovecot-sieve-1.0.2.tbz'
> Deleting dovecot-sieve-1.0.2
> pkg_delete: file '/usr/local/libdata/ldconfig/dovecot-sieve' doesn't exist
> pkg_delete: couldn't entirely delete package (perhaps the packing list is
> incorrectly specified?)
>
>
> You can investigate this?
>   
I see. No, that's fine, you can remove it ;-)

Patch approved as you suggested.

Greetings,

Nils
